introduction: Behind the massive ore deposits, you discover a dark passage carved through solid rock. This isn't natural—someone deliberately excavated a tunnel here.
The passage slopes upward, heading in the direction of the Hill Ruins. The cult must have dug this secret entrance to access the ruins from below, bypassing any surface defenses.
This tunnel would provide an alternate route into the Hill Ruins dungeon—a back door the cultists never expected anyone to find.
The tunnel looks stable enough, but it's dark and winding. You could use this to infiltrate the ruins when you're ready, avoiding whatever guards or traps the cult placed at the main entrance.
For now, you mark the location carefully. This discovery could prove invaluable when the time comes to assault the cult's stronghold.

options.text: [Mark the secret tunnel for future use]
